description.ko: 에메랄드빛 막과 황금빛 과즙이 리듬감 넘치는 액체 댄스 속에서 서로 뒤엉키는 살아 숨 쉬는 유기적 네트워크의 매크로 탐구입니다.
description.en: A macro exploration of a living, breathing organic network where emerald membranes and golden nectar intertwine in a rhythmic, liquid dance.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Mycelial Heartbeat.' A hyper-complex, breathing organic architecture composed of #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes and #2D5A3D dark forest vascular structures. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid, exhaling swirling #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar that flows like rhythmic liquid silk through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro cinematography focus on the rhythmic pulsation of translucent capillary systems. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene and divine movement.
